budgetEvidence.hardwareTimingRationale: Dead-zone following requests at most one pixel per axis per gameplay tick; packed preparation stays outside NMI and each serialized edge publication is bounded by VBlank.
budgetEvidence.productionTraceRationale: The 400-frame exact production traversal crosses both dead-zone boundaries, reverses both directions, draws the marker, and retains the authored 64x60 Tiled background.
